text.title: Weighted Decision Matrix Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-trade-off-decision-matrix.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: matrix_id pattern violation; question too short; <3 criteria; empty options; empty conflicts; tie_break_rule / recommendation empty; version + date malformed.
